Dingo looked around himself smiled. small Alaskan town Nome buzzing with excitement. Everyone knew why, course: Dingo's dad, Balto, along with brother, Kodi, other dogs were preparing huge sled team race. Balto Kodi were most famous sled dogs land Alaska, mention fastest.
Dingo's thoughts were interrupted warm voice. "Dingo, you're going miss race!" voice called from away. "Don't want wish Kodi good luck?"
Dingo recognized sister Saba walking toward grinned. "Okay, okay, coming," said. Then added with sneer, "You know, remind mom. You're both slave-drivers!" rolled around snow, laughing hysterically.
"Ha, ha," Saba said, rolling eyes. Apparently, hadn't enjoyed little joke much brother. "Come Ding-dong!"
Dingo ground approached sister. "Oh, you're going saying that!" said, faking angry look face. Then pounced sister knocked over. This time they were both rolling around ground laughing.
dogs were playfully fighting with each other until they heard gunshot. Saba wiggled brother's grasp gasped. "Way Ding-dong," said, pretending him. "Now missed start race!"
Before Saba could figure what happening, brother grabbed running toward huge crowd starting line. haven't missed yet!" shouted, panting.
Dingo weaved through crowd rapid pace, with Saba close behind. When past massive amount people animals, started running after sled teams. Saba him. "What doing?" screamed. "Get track! crazy?"
"Nah," Dingo called over shoulder. "I'm crazy. just want wish Kodi good luck!"
stood watching brother into distance, Saba shook head. brother completely lost it," muttered.
Dingo panted hard. almost caught sled dogs now. There were teams: lead Balto, other Kodi. Right now, Kodi's team lead.
Dingo sprinted faster. even with last Balto's team. Pretty soon began gain team until alongside father.
Balto definitely surprised. "What doing here, Dingo?" yelled. "You need back with your family!"
Dingo smiled kept even pace with father. just wanted wish good luck, Dad!" shouted. "Bye, I'll days!" Dingo waved dad, then picked speed catch with Kodi.
Kodi grinned when brother. "Sorry, Dingo, it's kind late join team now!" yelled with smile. "Wow, pretty fast!"
"Hey, Kodi!" Dingo shouted back brother. "No, don't want join your team"-(he laughed this point)-"I just wanted good luck! I'll days when race over!" Then Dingo swerved left racetrack. caught breath watched teams sprint past.
minutes after last passed view, Dingo again home. Halfway destination, Saba running meet him.
"You such idiot!" said playfully. "Why even think could catch fastest sled teams world?"
Dingo shrugged. don't know, did," said. just wanted goodbye Kodi. problem with that?" added, pushing sister playfully.
Saba returned brother's little shove. "No," said, smiling.
brother sister walked back Nome silence. Saba tried think something say, enjoying peaceful quietness Alaskan frontier.
Saba nose into soft hair Dingo's back. nice smooth.
Saba didn't know what would ever without brother. They were more than just siblings. ever lost him, would completely devastated.

Over time, song grossed some million, with Secunda Jacobs missing significant royalties. 1961, copyright song expired, ownership reverted Secunda Jacobs, signed contract with Harms, Inc., securing proper royalties. item consist file bonus file), melody track mp3, backing (play along) track mp3. full zoom sheet music just click image.

greater than P(x) smaller than equal P(x) P(y) with P(y)/100.
